The '''Atravis Sector Massacres''' were a series of brutal massacres carried out by [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Wilhuff Tarkin/Legends|Wilhuff Tarkin]] in the [[Atravis sector/Legends|Atravis sector]].<ref name="CotJ" />
